reason: generalization mismatch, currently tagged 'formalization' (exact-equivalent) in decl_qid_roles_v2.json despite status already correctly 'partial': Waring's problem asks whether every natural number k has a finite g(k) such that every n is a sum of at most g(k) k-th powers, for ALL k. The decl only proves the k=2 case (g(2)=4, the four-square theorem). Grepped Mathlib for 'Waring' (case-insensitive): no hits, so no decl formalizes the general problem or g(k) for other k. This decl is a genuine, well-known special case of Waring's problem (analogous to the insphere/inscribed-circle legitimate multi-to-multi pattern), not a wrong-decl match -- downgrade match_kind to special_case rather than override the status (already partial) or reassign the decl.
